value.body:
## Summary
Update the inbox system so that when a user opens an unread message, that message is automatically marked as read.

## Problem
Unread inbox messages currently remain unread after the user opens them, which can leave the inbox state inaccurate and require extra manual action from the user.

## Expected Behavior
When a user opens an unread inbox message, the system should persistently mark that message as read. Messages that are already read should remain unchanged.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Opening an unread inbox message updates its read state to `read`.
- Already-read messages remain read and do not trigger unnecessary state changes.
- The inbox UI reflects the updated read status without requiring a manual refresh where practical.
- The read-state update is persisted so the message remains read after navigation or reload.
- Relevant tests cover the read-state transition when opening an unread message.

## Implementation Notes
- Confirm the existing inbox interaction that represents "opened" in this codebase, such as selecting a list item, rendering a detail pane, or navigating to a message route.
- Prefer using existing inbox/message mutation patterns if they already exist.
- Avoid broad changes to unrelated notification or inbox behavior.

frontmatter.title: Mark unread inbox messages as read when opened

value.title: Mark unread inbox messages as read when opened
